name: Light & Wonder, Inc.
description: Light & Wonder, Inc. is a leading global cross-platform games company that specializes in creating content, hardware, and systems for the gaming industry. Formerly known as Scientific Games Corporation, the company focuses on delivering immersive entertainment experiences across land-based, online, and mobile channels. Headquartered in Las Vegas, Nevada, Light & Wonder is dedicated to innovation, providing iconic titles and cutting-edge technology that connect players to engaging stories and characters. Through its diverse portfolio, the company serves as a major provider of gambling products and services, continuously striving to redefine the boundaries of digital and physical gaming entertainment.
